revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-risk}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
This is the {{tl|Disambiguation/cat}} sub-template.
Do not use this template directly, use {{tl|Disambiguation}} or {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}} instead.
This template is called from {{tlf|Disambiguation}} and {{tlf|Disambiguation cleanup}}. It handles some of the categorization logic for those templates.
For more documentation see {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
{{tl|Dabcat}} redirects here, and is used by {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
== Parameters == This template takes one parameter and produces a category assignment dependent on that parameter.
The main parameter values (along with their aliases, listed in round brackets) for the categories in this template are as follows:
'''Maintenance disambiguation pages''' * split: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of being split]] * cleanup (or clean up, or clean-up): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup]] * one non-primary topic (or non-primary, or non-primary topic): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages containing one non-primary topic]]
'''Buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎'''
'''Non-religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎''' * building and structure (or building, buildings, structure, structures, or buildings and structures): for [[:Category:Buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * airport (or airports): for [[:Category:Airport disambiguation pages]] * architecture: for [[:Category:Architectural disambiguation pages‎]] * hospital (or hospital name, hospital names, or hospitals): for [[:Category:Hospital disambiguation pages]] * school (or schooldis, education, educational institution, educational institutions, college, colleges, university, universities, or schools): for [[:Category:Educational institution disambiguation pages]] * station (or stations): for [[:Category:Station disambiguation pages]]
'''Religion-specific''' * religion (or hindu, hindu temple, hindu temples, religious building, or religious buildings): for [[:Category:Religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * church (or church building, church buildings, or churches): for [[:Category:Church building disambiguation pages]] * mosque (or mosques): for [[:Category:Mosque disambiguation pages]] * synagogue (synagogues): for [[:Category:Synagogue disambiguation pages]] * temple (or buddhist, buddhist temple, buddhist temples, or temples): for [[:Category:Buddhist temple disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Science disambiguation pages''' * science: for [[:Category:Science disambiguation pages]]
'''Biology''' * biology: for [[:Category:Biology disambiguation pages‎]] * animal: for [[:Category:Animal common name disambiguation pages‎]] * bird: for [[:Category:Bird common name disambiguation pages]] * fish: for [[:Category:Fish common name disambiguation pages]] * plant (or plants): for [[:Category:Plant common name disambiguation pages]] * taxonomy: for [[:Category:Taxonomy disambiguation pages]] * genus (or genera): for [[:Category:Genus disambiguation pages]] * latin (or latin name, or latin names): for [[:Category:Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin (or species latin name, or species latin names): for [[:Category:Species Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin name abbreviation (or species latin name abbr, species latin name abbrs, or species latin name abbreviations): for [[:Category:Species Latin name abbreviation disambiguation pages]]
'''Other science disambiguation pages''' * linguistics: for [[:Category:Linguistics disambiguation pages]] * math (or mathdab, mathematics, mathematical, or maths): for [[:Category:Mathematics disambiguation pages]] * social science (or social): for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]] * economics: for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Place name disambiguation pages‎''' * geo (or geodis, geography, geographical, place name, place names, place, or places): for [[:Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] * county (or counties): for [[:Category:County name disambiguation pages]] * uscounty (or uscounties): for [[:Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] * department (or departments): for [[:Category:Department name disambiguation pages]] * district (or districts): for [[:Category:District name disambiguation pages]] * municipality (or municipalities): for [[:Category:Municipality name disambiguation pages‎]] * parish (or parishes): for [[:Category:Parish name disambiguation pages‎]] * province (or provinces): for [[:Category:Province name disambiguation pages]] * township (or townships): for [[:Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] * arkansas township (or arkansas townships): for [[:Category:Arkansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * illinois township (or illinois townships): for [[:Category:Illinois township disambiguation pages‎]] * indiana township (or indiana townships): for [[:Category:Indiana township disambiguation pages‎]] * iowa township (or iowa townships): for [[:Category:Iowa township disambiguation pages‎]] * kansas township (or kansas townships): for [[:Category:Kansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * michigan township (or michigan townships): for [[:Category:Michigan township disambiguation pages‎]] * minnesota township (or minnesota townships): for [[:Category:Minnesota township disambiguation pages‎]] * missouri township (or missouri townships): for [[:Category:Missouri township disambiguation pages‎]] * nebraska township (or nebraska townships): for [[:Category:Nebraska township disambiguation pages‎]] * new jersey township (or new jersey townships): for [[:Category:New Jersey township disambiguation pages‎]] * north carolina township (or north carolina townships): for [[:Category:North Carolina township disambiguation pages]] * north dakota township (north dakota townships): for [[:Category:North Dakota township disambiguation pages‎]] * ohio township (or ohio townships): for [[:Category:Ohio township disambiguation pages]] * oklahoma township (or oklahoma townships): for [[:Category:Oklahoma township disambiguation pages‎]] * pennsylvania township (or pennsylvania townships): for [[:Category:Pennsylvania township disambiguation pages‎]] * south dakota township (or south dakota townships): for [[:Category:South Dakota township disambiguation pages]]
'''Other disambiguation pages''' * callsign (or call sign, call signs, broadcast call sign, broadcast call signs, or callsigns): for [[:Category:Broadcast call sign disambiguation pages]] * caselaw: for [[:Category:Case law disambiguation pages]] * chinese (or chinese char, chinese-char, chinesechar, or chinese character): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Chinese character titles]] * culture (or language, languages, nationality, nationalities, language and nationality, languages and nationalities, or cultures): for [[:Category:Language and nationality disambiguation pages]] * date time (or date, or time): for [[:Category:Date and time disambiguation pages‎]] * flight number (or flight, or flight numbers): for [[:Category:Flight number disambiguation pages‎]] * opus number (or opus, or opus numbers): for [[:Category:Opus number disambiguation pages‎]] * hn (or name, names, human name, human names, or hndis): for [[:Category:Human name disambiguation pages]] * surname (or surnames): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with surname-holder lists]] * given name (or given names): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with given-name-holder lists]] * hangul: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Hangul titles]] * letter number (or letter-number): for [[:Category:Letter–number combination disambiguation pages]] * military: for [[:Category:Military units and formations disambiguation pages‎]] * number (or numberdis, ambiguous number, ambiguous numbers, or numbers): for [[:Category:Lists of ambiguous numbers]] * political party (or party, parties, political, or political parties): for [[:Category:Political party disambiguation pages]] * road (or roaddis, or roads): for [[:Category:Road disambiguation pages]] * road same title (or roads same title): for [[:Category:Lists of roads sharing the same title‎]] * ship (or ships): for [[:Category:Ship disambiguation pages]] * technology and engineering (or engineering, tech, tech and engineering, or technology): for [[:Category:Technology and engineering disambiguation pages]] * template (or templates): for [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]] * temple name (or temple names): for [[:Category:Temple name disambiguation pages‎]] * tndis: for [[:Category:Title and name disambiguation pages]] * transport route (or transport routes): for [[:Category:Transport route disambiguation pages‎]]
This list is currently complete {{as of|2023|10|28|lc=on}}, but we still add new categories to this template every now and then.
== Error reporting == If an invalid parameter is fed to this template it displays an error message and categorizes the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia disambig or set index box parameter needs fixing]]. Thus editors can see when they use an invalid parameter, and if they don't notice it we can easily find and fix such cases by taking a look in that category.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-risk}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
This is the {{tl|Disambiguation/cat}} sub-template.
Do not use this template directly, use {{tl|Disambiguation}} or {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}} instead.
This template is called from {{tlf|Disambiguation}} and {{tlf|Disambiguation cleanup}}. It handles some of the categorization logic for those templates.
For more documentation see {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
{{tl|Dabcat}} redirects here, and is used by {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
== Parameters == This template takes one parameter and produces a category assignment dependent on that parameter.
The main parameter values (along with their aliases, listed in round brackets) for the categories in this template are as follows:
'''Maintenance disambiguation pages''' * split: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of being split]] * cleanup (or clean up, or clean-up): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup]] * one non-primary topic (or non-primary, or non-primary topic): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages containing one non-primary topic]]
'''Buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎'''
'''Non-religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎''' * building and structure (or building, buildings, structure, structures, or buildings and structures): for [[:Category:Buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * airport (or airports): for [[:Category:Airport disambiguation pages]] * architecture: for [[:Category:Architectural disambiguation pages‎]] * hospital (or hospital name, hospital names, or hospitals): for [[:Category:Hospital disambiguation pages]] * school (or schooldis, education, educational institution, educational institutions, college, colleges, university, universities, or schools): for [[:Category:Educational institution disambiguation pages]] * station (or stations): for [[:Category:Station disambiguation pages]]
'''Religion-specific''' * religion (or hindu, hindu temple, hindu temples, religious building, or religious buildings): for [[:Category:Religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * church (or church building, church buildings, or churches): for [[:Category:Church building disambiguation pages]] * mosque (or mosques): for [[:Category:Mosque disambiguation pages]] * synagogue (synagogues): for [[:Category:Synagogue disambiguation pages]] * temple (or buddhist, buddhist temple, buddhist temples, or temples): for [[:Category:Buddhist temple disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Science disambiguation pages''' * science: for [[:Category:Science disambiguation pages]]
'''Biology''' * biology: for [[:Category:Biology disambiguation pages‎]] * animal: for [[:Category:Animal common name disambiguation pages‎]] * bird: for [[:Category:Bird common name disambiguation pages]] * fish: for [[:Category:Fish common name disambiguation pages]] * plant (or plants): for [[:Category:Plant common name disambiguation pages]] * taxonomy: for [[:Category:Taxonomy disambiguation pages]] * genus (or genera): for [[:Category:Genus disambiguation pages]] * latin (or latin name, or latin names): for [[:Category:Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin (or species latin name, or species latin names): for [[:Category:Species Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin name abbreviation (or species latin name abbr, species latin name abbrs, or species latin name abbreviations): for [[:Category:Species Latin name abbreviation disambiguation pages]]
'''Other science disambiguation pages''' * linguistics: for [[:Category:Linguistics disambiguation pages]] * math (or mathdab, mathematics, mathematical, or maths): for [[:Category:Mathematics disambiguation pages]] * social science (or social): for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]] * economics: for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Place name disambiguation pages‎''' * geo (or geodis, geography, geographical, place name, place names, place, or places): for [[:Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] * county (or counties): for [[:Category:County name disambiguation pages]] * uscounty (or uscounties): for [[:Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] * department (or departments): for [[:Category:Department name disambiguation pages]] * district (or districts): for [[:Category:District name disambiguation pages]] * municipality (or municipalities): for [[:Category:Municipality name disambiguation pages‎]] * parish (or parishes): for [[:Category:Parish name disambiguation pages‎]] * province (or provinces): for [[:Category:Province name disambiguation pages]] * township (or townships): for [[:Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] * arkansas township (or arkansas townships): for [[:Category:Arkansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * illinois township (or illinois townships): for [[:Category:Illinois township disambiguation pages‎]] * indiana township (or indiana townships): for [[:Category:Indiana township disambiguation pages‎]] * iowa township (or iowa townships): for [[:Category:Iowa township disambiguation pages‎]] * kansas township (or kansas townships): for [[:Category:Kansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * michigan township (or michigan townships): for [[:Category:Michigan township disambiguation pages‎]] * minnesota township (or minnesota townships): for [[:Category:Minnesota township disambiguation pages‎]] * missouri township (or missouri townships): for [[:Category:Missouri township disambiguation pages‎]] * nebraska township (or nebraska townships): for [[:Category:Nebraska township disambiguation pages‎]] * new jersey township (or new jersey townships): for [[:Category:New Jersey township disambiguation pages‎]] * north carolina township (or north carolina townships): for [[:Category:North Carolina township disambiguation pages]] * north dakota township (north dakota townships): for [[:Category:North Dakota township disambiguation pages‎]] * ohio township (or ohio townships): for [[:Category:Ohio township disambiguation pages]] * oklahoma township (or oklahoma townships): for [[:Category:Oklahoma township disambiguation pages‎]] * pennsylvania township (or pennsylvania townships): for [[:Category:Pennsylvania township disambiguation pages‎]] * south dakota township (or south dakota townships): for [[:Category:South Dakota township disambiguation pages]]
'''Other disambiguation pages''' * callsign (or call sign, call signs, broadcast call sign, broadcast call signs, or callsigns): for [[:Category:Broadcast call sign disambiguation pages]] * caselaw: for [[:Category:Case law disambiguation pages]] * chinese (or chinese char, chinese-char, chinesechar, or chinese character): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Chinese character titles]] * culture (or language, languages, nationality, nationalities, language and nationality, languages and nationalities, or cultures): for [[:Category:Language and nationality disambiguation pages]] * date time (or date, or time): for [[:Category:Date and time disambiguation pages‎]] * flight number (or flight, or flight numbers): for [[:Category:Flight number disambiguation pages‎]] * opus number (or opus, or opus numbers): for [[:Category:Opus number disambiguation pages‎]] * hn (or name, names, human name, human names, or hndis): for [[:Category:Human name disambiguation pages]] * surname (or surnames): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with surname-holder lists]] * given name (or given names): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with given-name-holder lists]] * hangul: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Hangul titles]] * letter number (or letter-number): for [[:Category:Letter–number combination disambiguation pages]] * military: for [[:Category:Military units and formations disambiguation pages‎]] * number (or numberdis, ambiguous number, ambiguous numbers, or numbers): for [[:Category:Lists of ambiguous numbers]] * political party (or party, parties, political, or political parties): for [[:Category:Political party disambiguation pages]] * road (or roaddis, or roads): for [[:Category:Road disambiguation pages]] * road same title (or roads same title): for [[:Category:Lists of roads sharing the same title‎]] * ship (or ships): for [[:Category:Ship disambiguation pages]] * technology and engineering (or engineering, tech, tech and engineering, or technology): for [[:Category:Technology and engineering disambiguation pages]] * template (or templates): for [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]] * temple name (or temple names): for [[:Category:Temple name disambiguation pages‎]] * tndis: for [[:Category:Title and name disambiguation pages]] * transport route (or transport routes): for [[:Category:Transport route disambiguation pages‎]]
This list is currently complete {{as of|2023|10|28|lc=on}}, but we still add new categories to this template every now and then.
== Error reporting == If an invalid parameter is fed to this template it displays an error message and categorizes the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia disambig or set index box parameter needs fixing]]. Thus editors can see when they use an invalid parameter, and if they don't notice it we can easily find and fix such cases by taking a look in that category.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]]
}}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-risk}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
This is the {{tl|Disambiguation/cat}} sub-template.
Do not use this template directly, use {{tl|Disambiguation}} or {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}} instead.
This template is called from {{tlf|Disambiguation}} and {{tlf|Disambiguation cleanup}}. It handles some of the categorization logic for those templates.
For more documentation see {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
{{tl|Dabcat}} redirects here, and is used by {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
== Parameters == This template takes one parameter and produces a category assignment dependent on that parameter.
The main parameter values (along with their aliases, listed in round brackets) for the categories in this template are as follows:
'''Maintenance disambiguation pages''' * split: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of being split]] * cleanup (or clean up, or clean-up): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup]] * one non-primary topic (or non-primary, or non-primary topic): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages containing one non-primary topic]]
'''Buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎'''
'''Non-religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎''' * building and structure (or building, buildings, structure, structures, or buildings and structures): for [[:Category:Buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * airport (or airports): for [[:Category:Airport disambiguation pages]] * architecture: for [[:Category:Architectural disambiguation pages‎]] * hospital (or hospital name, hospital names, or hospitals): for [[:Category:Hospital disambiguation pages]] * school (or schooldis, education, educational institution, educational institutions, college, colleges, university, universities, or schools): for [[:Category:Educational institution disambiguation pages]] * station (or stations): for [[:Category:Station disambiguation pages]]
'''Religion-specific''' * religion (or hindu, hindu temple, hindu temples, religious building, or religious buildings): for [[:Category:Religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * church (or church building, church buildings, or churches): for [[:Category:Church building disambiguation pages]] * mosque (or mosques): for [[:Category:Mosque disambiguation pages]] * synagogue (synagogues): for [[:Category:Synagogue disambiguation pages]] * temple (or buddhist, buddhist temple, buddhist temples, or temples): for [[:Category:Buddhist temple disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Science disambiguation pages''' * science: for [[:Category:Science disambiguation pages]]
'''Biology''' * biology: for [[:Category:Biology disambiguation pages‎]] * animal: for [[:Category:Animal common name disambiguation pages‎]] * bird: for [[:Category:Bird common name disambiguation pages]] * fish: for [[:Category:Fish common name disambiguation pages]] * plant (or plants): for [[:Category:Plant common name disambiguation pages]] * taxonomy: for [[:Category:Taxonomy disambiguation pages]] * genus (or genera): for [[:Category:Genus disambiguation pages]] * latin (or latin name, or latin names): for [[:Category:Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin (or species latin name, or species latin names): for [[:Category:Species Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin name abbreviation (or species latin name abbr, species latin name abbrs, or species latin name abbreviations): for [[:Category:Species Latin name abbreviation disambiguation pages]]
'''Other science disambiguation pages''' * linguistics: for [[:Category:Linguistics disambiguation pages]] * math (or mathdab, mathematics, mathematical, or maths): for [[:Category:Mathematics disambiguation pages]] * social science (or social): for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]] * economics: for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Place name disambiguation pages‎''' * geo (or geodis, geography, geographical, place name, place names, place, or places): for [[:Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] * county (or counties): for [[:Category:County name disambiguation pages]] * uscounty (or uscounties): for [[:Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] * department (or departments): for [[:Category:Department name disambiguation pages]] * district (or districts): for [[:Category:District name disambiguation pages]] * municipality (or municipalities): for [[:Category:Municipality name disambiguation pages‎]] * parish (or parishes): for [[:Category:Parish name disambiguation pages‎]] * province (or provinces): for [[:Category:Province name disambiguation pages]] * township (or townships): for [[:Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] * arkansas township (or arkansas townships): for [[:Category:Arkansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * illinois township (or illinois townships): for [[:Category:Illinois township disambiguation pages‎]] * indiana township (or indiana townships): for [[:Category:Indiana township disambiguation pages‎]] * iowa township (or iowa townships): for [[:Category:Iowa township disambiguation pages‎]] * kansas township (or kansas townships): for [[:Category:Kansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * michigan township (or michigan townships): for [[:Category:Michigan township disambiguation pages‎]] * minnesota township (or minnesota townships): for [[:Category:Minnesota township disambiguation pages‎]] * missouri township (or missouri townships): for [[:Category:Missouri township disambiguation pages‎]] * nebraska township (or nebraska townships): for [[:Category:Nebraska township disambiguation pages‎]] * new jersey township (or new jersey townships): for [[:Category:New Jersey township disambiguation pages‎]] * north carolina township (or north carolina townships): for [[:Category:North Carolina township disambiguation pages]] * north dakota township (north dakota townships): for [[:Category:North Dakota township disambiguation pages‎]] * ohio township (or ohio townships): for [[:Category:Ohio township disambiguation pages]] * oklahoma township (or oklahoma townships): for [[:Category:Oklahoma township disambiguation pages‎]] * pennsylvania township (or pennsylvania townships): for [[:Category:Pennsylvania township disambiguation pages‎]] * south dakota township (or south dakota townships): for [[:Category:South Dakota township disambiguation pages]]
'''Other disambiguation pages''' * callsign (or call sign, call signs, broadcast call sign, broadcast call signs, or callsigns): for [[:Category:Broadcast call sign disambiguation pages]] * caselaw: for [[:Category:Case law disambiguation pages]] * chinese (or chinese char, chinese-char, chinesechar, or chinese character): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Chinese character titles]] * culture (or language, languages, nationality, nationalities, language and nationality, languages and nationalities, or cultures): for [[:Category:Language and nationality disambiguation pages]] * date time (or date, or time): for [[:Category:Date and time disambiguation pages‎]] * flight number (or flight, or flight numbers): for [[:Category:Flight number disambiguation pages‎]] * opus number (or opus, or opus numbers): for [[:Category:Opus number disambiguation pages‎]] * hn (or name, names, human name, human names, or hndis): for [[:Category:Human name disambiguation pages]] * surname (or surnames): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with surname-holder lists]] * given name (or given names): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with given-name-holder lists]] * hangul: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Hangul titles]] * letter number (or letter-number): for [[:Category:Letter–number combination disambiguation pages]] * military: for [[:Category:Military units and formations disambiguation pages‎]] * number (or numberdis, ambiguous number, ambiguous numbers, or numbers): for [[:Category:Lists of ambiguous numbers]] * political party (or party, parties, political, or political parties): for [[:Category:Political party disambiguation pages]] * road (or roaddis, or roads): for [[:Category:Road disambiguation pages]] * road same title (or roads same title): for [[:Category:Lists of roads sharing the same title‎]] * ship (or ships): for [[:Category:Ship disambiguation pages]] * technology and engineering (or engineering, tech, tech and engineering, or technology): for [[:Category:Technology and engineering disambiguation pages]] * template (or templates): for [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]] * temple name (or temple names): for [[:Category:Temple name disambiguation pages‎]] * tndis: for [[:Category:Title and name disambiguation pages]] * transport route (or transport routes): for [[:Category:Transport route disambiguation pages‎]]
This list is currently complete {{as of|2023|10|28|lc=on}}, but we still add new categories to this template every now and then.
== Error reporting == If an invalid parameter is fed to this template it displays an error message and categorizes the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia disambig or set index box parameter needs fixing]]. Thus editors can see when they use an invalid parameter, and if they don't notice it we can easily find and fix such cases by taking a look in that category.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-risk}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
This is the {{tl|Disambiguation/cat}} sub-template.
Do not use this template directly, use {{tl|Disambiguation}} or {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}} instead.
This template is called from {{tlf|Disambiguation}} and {{tlf|Disambiguation cleanup}}. It handles some of the categorization logic for those templates.
For more documentation see {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
{{tl|Dabcat}} redirects here, and is used by {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
== Parameters == This template takes one parameter and produces a category assignment dependent on that parameter.
The main parameter values (along with their aliases, listed in round brackets) for the categories in this template are as follows:
'''Maintenance disambiguation pages''' * split: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of being split]] * cleanup (or clean up, or clean-up): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup]] * one non-primary topic (or non-primary, or non-primary topic): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages containing one non-primary topic]]
'''Buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎'''
'''Non-religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎''' * building and structure (or building, buildings, structure, structures, or buildings and structures): for [[:Category:Buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * airport (or airports): for [[:Category:Airport disambiguation pages]] * architecture: for [[:Category:Architectural disambiguation pages‎]] * hospital (or hospital name, hospital names, or hospitals): for [[:Category:Hospital disambiguation pages]] * school (or schooldis, education, educational institution, educational institutions, college, colleges, university, universities, or schools): for [[:Category:Educational institution disambiguation pages]] * station (or stations): for [[:Category:Station disambiguation pages]]
'''Religion-specific''' * religion (or hindu, hindu temple, hindu temples, religious building, or religious buildings): for [[:Category:Religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * church (or church building, church buildings, or churches): for [[:Category:Church building disambiguation pages]] * mosque (or mosques): for [[:Category:Mosque disambiguation pages]] * synagogue (synagogues): for [[:Category:Synagogue disambiguation pages]] * temple (or buddhist, buddhist temple, buddhist temples, or temples): for [[:Category:Buddhist temple disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Science disambiguation pages''' * science: for [[:Category:Science disambiguation pages]]
'''Biology''' * biology: for [[:Category:Biology disambiguation pages‎]] * animal: for [[:Category:Animal common name disambiguation pages‎]] * bird: for [[:Category:Bird common name disambiguation pages]] * fish: for [[:Category:Fish common name disambiguation pages]] * plant (or plants): for [[:Category:Plant common name disambiguation pages]] * taxonomy: for [[:Category:Taxonomy disambiguation pages]] * genus (or genera): for [[:Category:Genus disambiguation pages]] * latin (or latin name, or latin names): for [[:Category:Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin (or species latin name, or species latin names): for [[:Category:Species Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin name abbreviation (or species latin name abbr, species latin name abbrs, or species latin name abbreviations): for [[:Category:Species Latin name abbreviation disambiguation pages]]
'''Other science disambiguation pages''' * linguistics: for [[:Category:Linguistics disambiguation pages]] * math (or mathdab, mathematics, mathematical, or maths): for [[:Category:Mathematics disambiguation pages]] * social science (or social): for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]] * economics: for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Place name disambiguation pages‎''' * geo (or geodis, geography, geographical, place name, place names, place, or places): for [[:Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] * county (or counties): for [[:Category:County name disambiguation pages]] * uscounty (or uscounties): for [[:Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] * department (or departments): for [[:Category:Department name disambiguation pages]] * district (or districts): for [[:Category:District name disambiguation pages]] * municipality (or municipalities): for [[:Category:Municipality name disambiguation pages‎]] * parish (or parishes): for [[:Category:Parish name disambiguation pages‎]] * province (or provinces): for [[:Category:Province name disambiguation pages]] * township (or townships): for [[:Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] * arkansas township (or arkansas townships): for [[:Category:Arkansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * illinois township (or illinois townships): for [[:Category:Illinois township disambiguation pages‎]] * indiana township (or indiana townships): for [[:Category:Indiana township disambiguation pages‎]] * iowa township (or iowa townships): for [[:Category:Iowa township disambiguation pages‎]] * kansas township (or kansas townships): for [[:Category:Kansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * michigan township (or michigan townships): for [[:Category:Michigan township disambiguation pages‎]] * minnesota township (or minnesota townships): for [[:Category:Minnesota township disambiguation pages‎]] * missouri township (or missouri townships): for [[:Category:Missouri township disambiguation pages‎]] * nebraska township (or nebraska townships): for [[:Category:Nebraska township disambiguation pages‎]] * new jersey township (or new jersey townships): for [[:Category:New Jersey township disambiguation pages‎]] * north carolina township (or north carolina townships): for [[:Category:North Carolina township disambiguation pages]] * north dakota township (north dakota townships): for [[:Category:North Dakota township disambiguation pages‎]] * ohio township (or ohio townships): for [[:Category:Ohio township disambiguation pages]] * oklahoma township (or oklahoma townships): for [[:Category:Oklahoma township disambiguation pages‎]] * pennsylvania township (or pennsylvania townships): for [[:Category:Pennsylvania township disambiguation pages‎]] * south dakota township (or south dakota townships): for [[:Category:South Dakota township disambiguation pages]]
'''Other disambiguation pages''' * callsign (or call sign, call signs, broadcast call sign, broadcast call signs, or callsigns): for [[:Category:Broadcast call sign disambiguation pages]] * caselaw: for [[:Category:Case law disambiguation pages]] * chinese (or chinese char, chinese-char, chinesechar, or chinese character): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Chinese character titles]] * culture (or language, languages, nationality, nationalities, language and nationality, languages and nationalities, or cultures): for [[:Category:Language and nationality disambiguation pages]] * date time (or date, or time): for [[:Category:Date and time disambiguation pages‎]] * flight number (or flight, or flight numbers): for [[:Category:Flight number disambiguation pages‎]] * opus number (or opus, or opus numbers): for [[:Category:Opus number disambiguation pages‎]] * hn (or name, names, human name, human names, or hndis): for [[:Category:Human name disambiguation pages]] * surname (or surnames): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with surname-holder lists]] * given name (or given names): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with given-name-holder lists]] * hangul: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Hangul titles]] * letter number (or letter-number): for [[:Category:Letter–number combination disambiguation pages]] * military: for [[:Category:Military units and formations disambiguation pages‎]] * number (or numberdis, ambiguous number, ambiguous numbers, or numbers): for [[:Category:Lists of ambiguous numbers]] * political party (or party, parties, political, or political parties): for [[:Category:Political party disambiguation pages]] * road (or roaddis, or roads): for [[:Category:Road disambiguation pages]] * road same title (or roads same title): for [[:Category:Lists of roads sharing the same title‎]] * ship (or ships): for [[:Category:Ship disambiguation pages]] * technology and engineering (or engineering, tech, tech and engineering, or technology): for [[:Category:Technology and engineering disambiguation pages]] * template (or templates): for [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]] * temple name (or temple names): for [[:Category:Temple name disambiguation pages‎]] * tndis: for [[:Category:Title and name disambiguation pages]] * transport route (or transport routes): for [[:Category:Transport route disambiguation pages‎]]
This list is currently complete {{as of|2023|10|28|lc=on}}, but we still add new categories to this template every now and then.
== Error reporting == If an invalid parameter is fed to this template it displays an error message and categorizes the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia disambig or set index box parameter needs fixing]]. Thus editors can see when they use an invalid parameter, and if they don't notice it we can easily find and fix such cases by taking a look in that category.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]]
}}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-risk}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
This is the {{tl|Disambiguation/cat}} sub-template.
Do not use this template directly, use {{tl|Disambiguation}} or {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}} instead.
This template is called from {{tlf|Disambiguation}} and {{tlf|Disambiguation cleanup}}. It handles some of the categorization logic for those templates.
For more documentation see {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
{{tl|Dabcat}} redirects here, and is used by {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
== Parameters == This template takes one parameter and produces a category assignment dependent on that parameter.
The main parameter values (along with their aliases, listed in round brackets) for the categories in this template are as follows:
'''Maintenance disambiguation pages''' * split: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of being split]] * cleanup (or clean up, or clean-up): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup]] * one non-primary topic (or non-primary, or non-primary topic): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages containing one non-primary topic]]
'''Buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎'''
'''Non-religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎''' * building and structure (or building, buildings, structure, structures, or buildings and structures): for [[:Category:Buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * airport (or airports): for [[:Category:Airport disambiguation pages]] * architecture: for [[:Category:Architectural disambiguation pages‎]] * hospital (or hospital name, hospital names, or hospitals): for [[:Category:Hospital disambiguation pages]] * school (or schooldis, education, educational institution, educational institutions, college, colleges, university, universities, or schools): for [[:Category:Educational institution disambiguation pages]] * station (or stations): for [[:Category:Station disambiguation pages]]
'''Religion-specific''' * religion (or hindu, hindu temple, hindu temples, religious building, or religious buildings): for [[:Category:Religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * church (or church building, church buildings, or churches): for [[:Category:Church building disambiguation pages]] * mosque (or mosques): for [[:Category:Mosque disambiguation pages]] * synagogue (synagogues): for [[:Category:Synagogue disambiguation pages]] * temple (or buddhist, buddhist temple, buddhist temples, or temples): for [[:Category:Buddhist temple disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Science disambiguation pages''' * science: for [[:Category:Science disambiguation pages]]
'''Biology''' * biology: for [[:Category:Biology disambiguation pages‎]] * animal: for [[:Category:Animal common name disambiguation pages‎]] * bird: for [[:Category:Bird common name disambiguation pages]] * fish: for [[:Category:Fish common name disambiguation pages]] * plant (or plants): for [[:Category:Plant common name disambiguation pages]] * taxonomy: for [[:Category:Taxonomy disambiguation pages]] * genus (or genera): for [[:Category:Genus disambiguation pages]] * latin (or latin name, or latin names): for [[:Category:Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin (or species latin name, or species latin names): for [[:Category:Species Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin name abbreviation (or species latin name abbr, species latin name abbrs, or species latin name abbreviations): for [[:Category:Species Latin name abbreviation disambiguation pages]]
'''Other science disambiguation pages''' * linguistics: for [[:Category:Linguistics disambiguation pages]] * math (or mathdab, mathematics, mathematical, or maths): for [[:Category:Mathematics disambiguation pages]] * social science (or social): for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]] * economics: for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Place name disambiguation pages‎''' * geo (or geodis, geography, geographical, place name, place names, place, or places): for [[:Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] * county (or counties): for [[:Category:County name disambiguation pages]] * uscounty (or uscounties): for [[:Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] * department (or departments): for [[:Category:Department name disambiguation pages]] * district (or districts): for [[:Category:District name disambiguation pages]] * municipality (or municipalities): for [[:Category:Municipality name disambiguation pages‎]] * parish (or parishes): for [[:Category:Parish name disambiguation pages‎]] * province (or provinces): for [[:Category:Province name disambiguation pages]] * township (or townships): for [[:Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] * arkansas township (or arkansas townships): for [[:Category:Arkansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * illinois township (or illinois townships): for [[:Category:Illinois township disambiguation pages‎]] * indiana township (or indiana townships): for [[:Category:Indiana township disambiguation pages‎]] * iowa township (or iowa townships): for [[:Category:Iowa township disambiguation pages‎]] * kansas township (or kansas townships): for [[:Category:Kansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * michigan township (or michigan townships): for [[:Category:Michigan township disambiguation pages‎]] * minnesota township (or minnesota townships): for [[:Category:Minnesota township disambiguation pages‎]] * missouri township (or missouri townships): for [[:Category:Missouri township disambiguation pages‎]] * nebraska township (or nebraska townships): for [[:Category:Nebraska township disambiguation pages‎]] * new jersey township (or new jersey townships): for [[:Category:New Jersey township disambiguation pages‎]] * north carolina township (or north carolina townships): for [[:Category:North Carolina township disambiguation pages]] * north dakota township (north dakota townships): for [[:Category:North Dakota township disambiguation pages‎]] * ohio township (or ohio townships): for [[:Category:Ohio township disambiguation pages]] * oklahoma township (or oklahoma townships): for [[:Category:Oklahoma township disambiguation pages‎]] * pennsylvania township (or pennsylvania townships): for [[:Category:Pennsylvania township disambiguation pages‎]] * south dakota township (or south dakota townships): for [[:Category:South Dakota township disambiguation pages]]
'''Other disambiguation pages''' * callsign (or call sign, call signs, broadcast call sign, broadcast call signs, or callsigns): for [[:Category:Broadcast call sign disambiguation pages]] * caselaw: for [[:Category:Case law disambiguation pages]] * chinese (or chinese char, chinese-char, chinesechar, or chinese character): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Chinese character titles]] * culture (or language, languages, nationality, nationalities, language and nationality, languages and nationalities, or cultures): for [[:Category:Language and nationality disambiguation pages]] * date time (or date, or time): for [[:Category:Date and time disambiguation pages‎]] * flight number (or flight, or flight numbers): for [[:Category:Flight number disambiguation pages‎]] * opus number (or opus, or opus numbers): for [[:Category:Opus number disambiguation pages‎]] * hn (or name, names, human name, human names, or hndis): for [[:Category:Human name disambiguation pages]] * surname (or surnames): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with surname-holder lists]] * given name (or given names): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with given-name-holder lists]] * hangul: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Hangul titles]] * letter number (or letter-number): for [[:Category:Letter–number combination disambiguation pages]] * military: for [[:Category:Military units and formations disambiguation pages‎]] * number (or numberdis, ambiguous number, ambiguous numbers, or numbers): for [[:Category:Lists of ambiguous numbers]] * political party (or party, parties, political, or political parties): for [[:Category:Political party disambiguation pages]] * road (or roaddis, or roads): for [[:Category:Road disambiguation pages]] * road same title (or roads same title): for [[:Category:Lists of roads sharing the same title‎]] * ship (or ships): for [[:Category:Ship disambiguation pages]] * technology and engineering (or engineering, tech, tech and engineering, or technology): for [[:Category:Technology and engineering disambiguation pages]] * template (or templates): for [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]] * temple name (or temple names): for [[:Category:Temple name disambiguation pages‎]] * tndis: for [[:Category:Title and name disambiguation pages]] * transport route (or transport routes): for [[:Category:Transport route disambiguation pages‎]]
This list is currently complete {{as of|2023|10|28|lc=on}}, but we still add new categories to this template every now and then.
== Error reporting == If an invalid parameter is fed to this template it displays an error message and categorizes the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia disambig or set index box parameter needs fixing]]. Thus editors can see when they use an invalid parameter, and if they don't notice it we can easily find and fix such cases by taking a look in that category.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation%2Fcat%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation%2Fcat%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-risk}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
This is the {{tl|Disambiguation/cat}} sub-template.
Do not use this template directly, use {{tl|Disambiguation}} or {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}} instead.
This template is called from {{tlf|Disambiguation}} and {{tlf|Disambiguation cleanup}}. It handles some of the categorization logic for those templates.
For more documentation see {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
{{tl|Dabcat}} redirects here, and is used by {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
== Parameters == This template takes one parameter and produces a category assignment dependent on that parameter.
The main parameter values (along with their aliases, listed in round brackets) for the categories in this template are as follows:
'''Maintenance disambiguation pages''' * split: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of being split]] * cleanup (or clean up, or clean-up): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup]] * one non-primary topic (or non-primary, or non-primary topic): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages containing one non-primary topic]]
'''Buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎'''
'''Non-religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎''' * building and structure (or building, buildings, structure, structures, or buildings and structures): for [[:Category:Buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * airport (or airports): for [[:Category:Airport disambiguation pages]] * architecture: for [[:Category:Architectural disambiguation pages‎]] * hospital (or hospital name, hospital names, or hospitals): for [[:Category:Hospital disambiguation pages]] * school (or schooldis, education, educational institution, educational institutions, college, colleges, university, universities, or schools): for [[:Category:Educational institution disambiguation pages]] * station (or stations): for [[:Category:Station disambiguation pages]]
'''Religion-specific''' * religion (or hindu, hindu temple, hindu temples, religious building, or religious buildings): for [[:Category:Religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * church (or church building, church buildings, or churches): for [[:Category:Church building disambiguation pages]] * mosque (or mosques): for [[:Category:Mosque disambiguation pages]] * synagogue (synagogues): for [[:Category:Synagogue disambiguation pages]] * temple (or buddhist, buddhist temple, buddhist temples, or temples): for [[:Category:Buddhist temple disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Science disambiguation pages''' * science: for [[:Category:Science disambiguation pages]]
'''Biology''' * biology: for [[:Category:Biology disambiguation pages‎]] * animal: for [[:Category:Animal common name disambiguation pages‎]] * bird: for [[:Category:Bird common name disambiguation pages]] * fish: for [[:Category:Fish common name disambiguation pages]] * plant (or plants): for [[:Category:Plant common name disambiguation pages]] * taxonomy: for [[:Category:Taxonomy disambiguation pages]] * genus (or genera): for [[:Category:Genus disambiguation pages]] * latin (or latin name, or latin names): for [[:Category:Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin (or species latin name, or species latin names): for [[:Category:Species Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin name abbreviation (or species latin name abbr, species latin name abbrs, or species latin name abbreviations): for [[:Category:Species Latin name abbreviation disambiguation pages]]
'''Other science disambiguation pages''' * linguistics: for [[:Category:Linguistics disambiguation pages]] * math (or mathdab, mathematics, mathematical, or maths): for [[:Category:Mathematics disambiguation pages]] * social science (or social): for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]] * economics: for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Place name disambiguation pages‎''' * geo (or geodis, geography, geographical, place name, place names, place, or places): for [[:Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] * county (or counties): for [[:Category:County name disambiguation pages]] * uscounty (or uscounties): for [[:Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] * department (or departments): for [[:Category:Department name disambiguation pages]] * district (or districts): for [[:Category:District name disambiguation pages]] * municipality (or municipalities): for [[:Category:Municipality name disambiguation pages‎]] * parish (or parishes): for [[:Category:Parish name disambiguation pages‎]] * province (or provinces): for [[:Category:Province name disambiguation pages]] * township (or townships): for [[:Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] * arkansas township (or arkansas townships): for [[:Category:Arkansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * illinois township (or illinois townships): for [[:Category:Illinois township disambiguation pages‎]] * indiana township (or indiana townships): for [[:Category:Indiana township disambiguation pages‎]] * iowa township (or iowa townships): for [[:Category:Iowa township disambiguation pages‎]] * kansas township (or kansas townships): for [[:Category:Kansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * michigan township (or michigan townships): for [[:Category:Michigan township disambiguation pages‎]] * minnesota township (or minnesota townships): for [[:Category:Minnesota township disambiguation pages‎]] * missouri township (or missouri townships): for [[:Category:Missouri township disambiguation pages‎]] * nebraska township (or nebraska townships): for [[:Category:Nebraska township disambiguation pages‎]] * new jersey township (or new jersey townships): for [[:Category:New Jersey township disambiguation pages‎]] * north carolina township (or north carolina townships): for [[:Category:North Carolina township disambiguation pages]] * north dakota township (north dakota townships): for [[:Category:North Dakota township disambiguation pages‎]] * ohio township (or ohio townships): for [[:Category:Ohio township disambiguation pages]] * oklahoma township (or oklahoma townships): for [[:Category:Oklahoma township disambiguation pages‎]] * pennsylvania township (or pennsylvania townships): for [[:Category:Pennsylvania township disambiguation pages‎]] * south dakota township (or south dakota townships): for [[:Category:South Dakota township disambiguation pages]]
'''Other disambiguation pages''' * callsign (or call sign, call signs, broadcast call sign, broadcast call signs, or callsigns): for [[:Category:Broadcast call sign disambiguation pages]] * caselaw: for [[:Category:Case law disambiguation pages]] * chinese (or chinese char, chinese-char, chinesechar, or chinese character): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Chinese character titles]] * culture (or language, languages, nationality, nationalities, language and nationality, languages and nationalities, or cultures): for [[:Category:Language and nationality disambiguation pages]] * date time (or date, or time): for [[:Category:Date and time disambiguation pages‎]] * flight number (or flight, or flight numbers): for [[:Category:Flight number disambiguation pages‎]] * opus number (or opus, or opus numbers): for [[:Category:Opus number disambiguation pages‎]] * hn (or name, names, human name, human names, or hndis): for [[:Category:Human name disambiguation pages]] * surname (or surnames): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with surname-holder lists]] * given name (or given names): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with given-name-holder lists]] * hangul: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Hangul titles]] * letter number (or letter-number): for [[:Category:Letter–number combination disambiguation pages]] * military: for [[:Category:Military units and formations disambiguation pages‎]] * number (or numberdis, ambiguous number, ambiguous numbers, or numbers): for [[:Category:Lists of ambiguous numbers]] * political party (or party, parties, political, or political parties): for [[:Category:Political party disambiguation pages]] * road (or roaddis, or roads): for [[:Category:Road disambiguation pages]] * road same title (or roads same title): for [[:Category:Lists of roads sharing the same title‎]] * ship (or ships): for [[:Category:Ship disambiguation pages]] * technology and engineering (or engineering, tech, tech and engineering, or technology): for [[:Category:Technology and engineering disambiguation pages]] * template (or templates): for [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]] * temple name (or temple names): for [[:Category:Temple name disambiguation pages‎]] * tndis: for [[:Category:Title and name disambiguation pages]] * transport route (or transport routes): for [[:Category:Transport route disambiguation pages‎]]
This list is currently complete {{as of|2023|10|28|lc=on}}, but we still add new categories to this template every now and then.
== Error reporting == If an invalid parameter is fed to this template it displays an error message and categorizes the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia disambig or set index box parameter needs fixing]]. Thus editors can see when they use an invalid parameter, and if they don't notice it we can easily find and fix such cases by taking a look in that category.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation%2Fcat%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-risk}}
This is the {{tl|Disambiguation/cat}} sub-template.
Do not use this template directly, use {{tl|Disambiguation}} or {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}} instead.
This template is called from {{tlf|Disambiguation}} and {{tlf|Disambiguation cleanup}}. It handles some of the categorization logic for those templates.
For more documentation see {{tl|Disambiguation}} and {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
{{tl|Dabcat}} redirects here, and is used by {{tl|Disambiguation cleanup}}.
== Parameters == This template takes one parameter and produces a category assignment dependent on that parameter.
The main parameter values (along with their aliases, listed in round brackets) for the categories in this template are as follows:
'''Maintenance disambiguation pages''' * split: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of being split]] * cleanup (or clean up, or clean-up): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup]] * one non-primary topic (or non-primary, or non-primary topic): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages containing one non-primary topic]]
'''Buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎'''
'''Non-religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages‎''' * building and structure (or building, buildings, structure, structures, or buildings and structures): for [[:Category:Buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * airport (or airports): for [[:Category:Airport disambiguation pages]] * architecture: for [[:Category:Architectural disambiguation pages‎]] * hospital (or hospital name, hospital names, or hospitals): for [[:Category:Hospital disambiguation pages]] * school (or schooldis, education, educational institution, educational institutions, college, colleges, university, universities, or schools): for [[:Category:Educational institution disambiguation pages]] * station (or stations): for [[:Category:Station disambiguation pages]]
'''Religion-specific''' * religion (or hindu, hindu temple, hindu temples, religious building, or religious buildings): for [[:Category:Religious buildings and structures disambiguation pages]] * church (or church building, church buildings, or churches): for [[:Category:Church building disambiguation pages]] * mosque (or mosques): for [[:Category:Mosque disambiguation pages]] * synagogue (synagogues): for [[:Category:Synagogue disambiguation pages]] * temple (or buddhist, buddhist temple, buddhist temples, or temples): for [[:Category:Buddhist temple disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Science disambiguation pages''' * science: for [[:Category:Science disambiguation pages]]
'''Biology''' * biology: for [[:Category:Biology disambiguation pages‎]] * animal: for [[:Category:Animal common name disambiguation pages‎]] * bird: for [[:Category:Bird common name disambiguation pages]] * fish: for [[:Category:Fish common name disambiguation pages]] * plant (or plants): for [[:Category:Plant common name disambiguation pages]] * taxonomy: for [[:Category:Taxonomy disambiguation pages]] * genus (or genera): for [[:Category:Genus disambiguation pages]] * latin (or latin name, or latin names): for [[:Category:Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin (or species latin name, or species latin names): for [[:Category:Species Latin name disambiguation pages]] * species latin name abbreviation (or species latin name abbr, species latin name abbrs, or species latin name abbreviations): for [[:Category:Species Latin name abbreviation disambiguation pages]]
'''Other science disambiguation pages''' * linguistics: for [[:Category:Linguistics disambiguation pages]] * math (or mathdab, mathematics, mathematical, or maths): for [[:Category:Mathematics disambiguation pages]] * social science (or social): for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]] * economics: for [[:Category:Social science disambiguation pages‎]]
'''Place name disambiguation pages‎''' * geo (or geodis, geography, geographical, place name, place names, place, or places): for [[:Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] * county (or counties): for [[:Category:County name disambiguation pages]] * uscounty (or uscounties): for [[:Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] * department (or departments): for [[:Category:Department name disambiguation pages]] * district (or districts): for [[:Category:District name disambiguation pages]] * municipality (or municipalities): for [[:Category:Municipality name disambiguation pages‎]] * parish (or parishes): for [[:Category:Parish name disambiguation pages‎]] * province (or provinces): for [[:Category:Province name disambiguation pages]] * township (or townships): for [[:Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] * arkansas township (or arkansas townships): for [[:Category:Arkansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * illinois township (or illinois townships): for [[:Category:Illinois township disambiguation pages‎]] * indiana township (or indiana townships): for [[:Category:Indiana township disambiguation pages‎]] * iowa township (or iowa townships): for [[:Category:Iowa township disambiguation pages‎]] * kansas township (or kansas townships): for [[:Category:Kansas township disambiguation pages‎]] * michigan township (or michigan townships): for [[:Category:Michigan township disambiguation pages‎]] * minnesota township (or minnesota townships): for [[:Category:Minnesota township disambiguation pages‎]] * missouri township (or missouri townships): for [[:Category:Missouri township disambiguation pages‎]] * nebraska township (or nebraska townships): for [[:Category:Nebraska township disambiguation pages‎]] * new jersey township (or new jersey townships): for [[:Category:New Jersey township disambiguation pages‎]] * north carolina township (or north carolina townships): for [[:Category:North Carolina township disambiguation pages]] * north dakota township (north dakota townships): for [[:Category:North Dakota township disambiguation pages‎]] * ohio township (or ohio townships): for [[:Category:Ohio township disambiguation pages]] * oklahoma township (or oklahoma townships): for [[:Category:Oklahoma township disambiguation pages‎]] * pennsylvania township (or pennsylvania townships): for [[:Category:Pennsylvania township disambiguation pages‎]] * south dakota township (or south dakota townships): for [[:Category:South Dakota township disambiguation pages]]
'''Other disambiguation pages''' * callsign (or call sign, call signs, broadcast call sign, broadcast call signs, or callsigns): for [[:Category:Broadcast call sign disambiguation pages]] * caselaw: for [[:Category:Case law disambiguation pages]] * chinese (or chinese char, chinese-char, chinesechar, or chinese character): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Chinese character titles]] * culture (or language, languages, nationality, nationalities, language and nationality, languages and nationalities, or cultures): for [[:Category:Language and nationality disambiguation pages]] * date time (or date, or time): for [[:Category:Date and time disambiguation pages‎]] * flight number (or flight, or flight numbers): for [[:Category:Flight number disambiguation pages‎]] * opus number (or opus, or opus numbers): for [[:Category:Opus number disambiguation pages‎]] * hn (or name, names, human name, human names, or hndis): for [[:Category:Human name disambiguation pages]] * surname (or surnames): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with surname-holder lists]] * given name (or given names): for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with given-name-holder lists]] * hangul: for [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with Hangul titles]] * letter number (or letter-number): for [[:Category:Letter–number combination disambiguation pages]] * military: for [[:Category:Military units and formations disambiguation pages‎]] * number (or numberdis, ambiguous number, ambiguous numbers, or numbers): for [[:Category:Lists of ambiguous numbers]] * political party (or party, parties, political, or political parties): for [[:Category:Political party disambiguation pages]] * road (or roaddis, or roads): for [[:Category:Road disambiguation pages]] * road same title (or roads same title): for [[:Category:Lists of roads sharing the same title‎]] * ship (or ships): for [[:Category:Ship disambiguation pages]] * technology and engineering (or engineering, tech, tech and engineering, or technology): for [[:Category:Technology and engineering disambiguation pages]] * template (or templates): for [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]] * temple name (or temple names): for [[:Category:Temple name disambiguation pages‎]] * tndis: for [[:Category:Title and name disambiguation pages]] * transport route (or transport routes): for [[:Category:Transport route disambiguation pages‎]]
This list is currently complete {{as of|2023|10|28|lc=on}}, but we still add new categories to this template every now and then.
== Error reporting == If an invalid parameter is fed to this template it displays an error message and categorizes the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia disambig or set index box parameter needs fixing]]. Thus editors can see when they use an invalid parameter, and if they don't notice it we can easily find and fix such cases by taking a look in that category.

}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
